chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 295 - وَقَالَ أَبُو اَلْحَسَنِ مُوسَى بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «غَسْلُ اَلرَّأْسِ بِالسِّدْرِ يَجْلِبُ اَلرِّزْقَ جَلْباً».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.295 - Abu Al-Hasan Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) said:
"Washing the head with sidr (lote tree leaves) brings sustenance abundantly."
